revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''歳刑神'''（さいぎょうしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人に[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては、'''さ...'
revision.text:
'''歳刑神'''（さいぎょうしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人に[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては、'''さいけう'''（'''さいぎょう'''）と書くことがある。[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[堅牢地神]]（けんろうちしん）とされる。
歳刑神は、[[水星]]（辰星）の精とされ、殺罰、刑殺をつかさどる神とされる。この神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって事業を始めたり、[[引越し|移転]]することは凶とされるが、この神は[[武力]]・[[武器]]を好むことから武器や[[刃物]]などの製造や購入・[[訴訟]]や争いごとなどはよいとされる。なお、この神は刑罰をつかさどる神であることから訴訟や[[刑事事件]]・争いごとなどで、その者の行為が理にかなっている場合は吉となるが、そうでないときは罰を受けるという。また、この神は[[土]]に関する性格も持っており、この神の在位する方角へ向かっての動土、種まき、植林などは凶となるという。
==歳刑神の在位== *その歳の十二支→在位する方位 **子→卯 **丑→戌 **寅→巳 **卯→子 **辰→辰 **巳→申 **午→午 **未→丑 **申→寅 **酉→酉 **戌→未 **亥→亥
==関連項目== *[[八将神]] *[[方位神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいきようしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

revision.comment: Created page with "[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}. Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill..."
revision.text:
[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}}
[[Category:Deities in Onmyōdō]] [[Category:Mercury deities]] {{Japan-culture-stub}} [[ja:歳刑神]]

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}}

In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}}

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}}

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)
== See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}}

However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥)

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saikei Shin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教|12=draft}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏|12=draft}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=draft}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury|ja|水星|12=draft}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土|12=draft}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支|12=draft}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=draft}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|歳刑神]] '''歳刑神'''（さいぎょうしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては、'''さいけい'''（'''さいぎょう'''）と書くことがある。[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[堅牢地神]]（けんろうちしん）とされる。
歳刑神は、[[水星]]（辰星）の精とされ、殺罰、刑殺をつかさどる神とされる。この神の在位する[[方位|方角]]に向かって事業を始めたり、[[引越し|移転]]することは凶とされるが、この神は[[武力]]・[[武器]]を好むことから武器や[[刃物]]などの製造や購入・[[訴訟]]や争いごとなどはよいとされる。なお、この神は刑罰をつかさどる神であることから訴訟や[[刑事事件]]・争いごとなどで、その者の行為が理にかなっている場合は吉となるが、そうでないときは罰を受けるという。また、この神は[[土]]に関する性格も持っており、この神の在位する方角へ向かっての動土、種まき、植林などは凶となるという。
==歳刑神の在位== *その歳の十二支→在位する方位 **子→卯 **丑→戌 **寅→巳 **卯→子 **辰→辰 **巳→申 **午→午 **未→丑 **申→寅 **酉→酉 **戌→未 **亥→亥
==関連項目== *[[八将神]] *[[方位神]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:さいきようしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:水星神]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.

However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.

== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. == Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.

== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Mercury (planet)|Mercury]] (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]]: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q130423]] Wikidata name: Saigyōshin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|WD=Q308|lt=Mercury}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|WD=Q308|lt=Mercury}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.

[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|WD=Q308|lt=Mercury}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.

Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:歳刑神]][[zh:歲刑神]]
[[File:God of Saikei.png|thumb|right|170px|Saikei Shin]] '''Saigyōshin''' (歳刑神, さいぎょうしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendar texts, it may also be written as "さいけい" or "さいぎょう" (Saikei or Saigyō). In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism|1=Buddhism}}, the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha|1=Honji suijaku}} of Saikei Shin is {{ill|Kenrochijin|ja|堅牢地神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenrochijin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 地天|1=Jiten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q123527556}}.
Saikei Shin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Mercury (planet)|en|Mercury (planet)|WD=Q308|lt=Mercury|1=Mercury (planet)}} (辰星) and governs punishment and judicial matters. It is considered inauspicious to initiate enterprises, relocate, or engage in activities directed toward the direction of Saikei Shin's residence. However, as this deity is associated with military force and weapons, it is considered auspicious to manufacture or purchase weapons, blades, or engage in lawsuits and disputes. If the actions in legal or contentious matters are justifiable, the influence of Saikei Shin is deemed favorable; otherwise, one is likely to face punishment.
Saikei Shin also has attributes associated with {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Activities such as earth-moving, sowing seeds, or planting trees in the direction of Saikei Shin's presence are considered ill-advised and inauspicious.
== Saikei Shin's Position == Saikei Shin's position varies based on the year's {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}}: * Rat (子) → Rabbit (卯) * Ox (丑) → Dog (戌) * Tiger (寅) → Snake (巳) * Rabbit (卯) → Rat (子) * Dragon (辰) → Dragon (辰) * Snake (巳) → Monkey (申) * Horse (午) → Horse (午) * Goat (未) → Ox (丑) * Monkey (申) → Tiger (寅) * Rooster (酉) → Rooster (酉) * Dog (戌) → Goat (未) * Pig (亥) → Pig (亥) == See Also == * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}
